whatWasImplemented: supabase/migrations/20260419050000_supplementary_files_realtime.sql — publishes supplementary_files on supabase_realtime so status transitions push to the subscribed client.
src/lib/files/ui-status.ts — pure helpers: statusChip() maps queued/processing/ready/failed to {label, tone}; formatBytes() human-friendly size rendering. 5 unit tests.

src/app/dashboard/settings/knowledge/page.tsx — server component. Parallel-loads supplementary_files rows (ordered newest-first) + profile.plan_id -> plan.supplementary_file_limit (Starter=25 fallback). Empty-state fallback when the user has no site yet.

src/app/dashboard/settings/knowledge/knowledge-client.tsx — client component. Native drag+drop + file-input fallback (no react-dropzone dep). Upload flow POSTs /api/files; toasts success / duplicate / error. File list with StatusChip + formatBytes + chunks_count + error_message (when failed). Retry button on failed rows POSTs /api/files/process to re-queue. Delete button with window.confirm + DELETE /api/files/[id]; Realtime DELETE event also clears the row in case of out-of-band removal. Supabase Realtime channel on supplementary_files filtered by site_id=eq.X handles INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE to reflect queued -> processing -> ready live.
Accept attribute on the <input> mirrors ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS so the native picker filters by type client-side (belt-and-suspenders with the server-side magic-byte sniff).
whatWasLeftUndone: Playwright screenshots for VAL-FILE-001 (7 accepted types + rejected type with inline error) and VAL-FILE-002 (status-chip state snapshots), VAL-FILE-015 (failed+retry loop), VAL-FILE-025 (empty-state render). Logic is in place and unit-tested via statusChip / formatBytes helpers.

react-dropzone not installed — not needed with the native implementation, and avoids another dep. Feature spec mentioned react-dropzone but the behavior (accept filter, drop handler, browse fallback) is covered.
discoveredIssues: Client component couldn't reference userId outside a DOM node without TS 'unused var' — added `{void userId}` as a marker. Cleaner: pass only the fields the component actually needs; revisit if we add user-scoped UI state.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 432 passed / 1 skipped / 58 files (+5 new for ui-status helpers).
